OPEN HOUSES

Open houses will start on April 26, 2026 

from 1-4 PM

WEATHER PERMITTING


Open houses are on the last Sunday of the month

 from April to October.

Ladies Tea

5th Annual Ladies Tea

Saturday, May 2, 2026

Watch for more information

BAND CONCERT

Performance by the 

University Heights Symphonic Band

Thursday, July 15, 2026 at 7PM

Bring your lawn chairs 

and enjoy the music

Moments in Time: events over the years

    Longwood Manor Historical Society Meetings

    Membership meetings

    Membership meetings of Longwood Manor Historical Society (LMHS) are the 4th Tuesday of each month from March-November.  Meetings start at 10AM and are held at the Manor. 

    President:  Deborah Mikulski

    Secretary/Treasurer: Dorothy Berman

    Workdays

    Workdays are usually on Tuesdays from March to December.  Other months and dates called as schedule and weather permits. We have student volunteers helping us.
